$comment: harden: the production gate. Runs the full quality/security suite over a workspace (go_quality: gofmt, vet, build, test -race, staticcheck, govulncheck, gosec) and passes only if every present tool is clean. Deterministic (no model) - a thin wrapper over the go_quality tool, like `run`. Findings are surfaced for you to fix (e.g. with edit_file). Run: `ratchet flow . harden --ws <proj> ""` (console: `/ws switch <proj>` then `/flow harden`), or `/do go_quality <proj>`.
summary: Run the full quality/security gate over a workspace (gofmt, vet, build, test -race, staticcheck, govulncheck, gosec); pass only if all present tools are clean.
